articles.author: Anthony Ha
articles.title: Copilot is ‘for entertainment purposes only,’ according to Microsoft’s terms of use - TechCrunch
articles.description: AI skeptics aren’t the only ones warning users not to unthinkingly trust models’ outputs — that’s what the AI companies say themselves in their terms of service.
articles.content:
AI skeptics arent the only ones warning users not to unthinkingly trust models outputs thats what the AI companies say themselves in their terms of service.
